---
title: "Subscription and billing"
description: "Rumizi subscription plans, how to upgrade, and what happens when a trial ends."
sidebarTitle: "Subscription"
icon: "credit-card"
---

Rumizi runs on one simple plan with a choice of billing cadence. No tiers,
no feature unlocks — everything you see in your workspace is part of the
plan.

## The plan

<Columns cols={2}>
  <Card title="Monthly" icon="calendar">
    **$35 / month**, billed in USD. Cancel any time; you keep the plan
    until the end of the current period.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Yearly" icon="calendar-days">
    **$350 / year**, billed in USD. Two months free compared with the
    monthly plan.
  </Card>
</Columns>

## Subscribe

<Steps>
  <Step title="Open Billing">
    In the workspace, go to **Billing**. Direct URL:
    `rumizi.com/your-venue/w/billing`.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Pick a cadence">
    Tap **Monthly** or **Yearly**. You're redirected to Stripe's secure
    checkout page.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Pay">
    Fill in your card details on Stripe. Rumizi never sees your card
    number.
  </Step>
  <Step title="You're active">
    After a successful payment, Stripe sends a confirmation back to
    Rumizi and your venue is marked active. You can go back to your
    workspace.
  </Step>
</Steps>

## Trials and grace periods

New venues start on a **trial**. You get the full workspace and a live
public menu during the trial — nothing is gated behind a subscription
during this window.

When the trial ends, your venue moves to a short **grace period** before
it's blocked. If you subscribe during either window, no interruption for
your diners.

<Note>
If I ever have to block a venue for billing, the public menu is paused —
diners see a "Temporarily unavailable" page, not a broken link. The
moment you subscribe, it comes back.
</Note>

## 100% satisfaction

If Rumizi doesn't work for you in the first month, email
[hi@rumizi.com](mailto:hi@rumizi.com) and I'll sort it out personally.

## What's not in v1

A few billing features aren't in this version yet:

- **In-app cancel** — to cancel, email
  [hi@rumizi.com](mailto:hi@rumizi.com) and I'll cancel for you.
- **Change card in-app** — same: email me.
- **Multi-currency billing** — today's plan is USD only. Menu prices are
  independent — your menu can be priced in any currency.
